song.title: Just As I Am - old tune
song.presentation: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D A D Just as I am, without one plea, . A A7 D But that Thy blood was shed for me, . D7 G And that Thou bid'st me come to Thee, . D A O lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V2] .D A D Just as I am, and waiting not . A A7 D To rid my soul of one dark blot; . D7 G To Thee whose blood can cleanse each spot . D A O lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V3] .D A D Just as I am, though tossed about . A A7 D With many a conflict, many a doubt; . D7 G Fightings within, and fears without, . D A O lamb of God, I come, I come! --- [V4] .D A D Just as I am, poor, wretched, blind; . A A7 D Sight, riches healing of the mind; . D7 G Yes, all I need, in Thee to find, . D A O Lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V5] .D A D Just as I am, Thou wilt receive, . A A7 D Wilt welcome, pardon, cleanse, relieve; . D7 G Because Thy promise I believe, . D A O lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V6] .D A D Just as I am, Thy love unknown . A A7 D Has broken every barrier down; . D7 G Now, to be Thine, yea, Thine alone, . D A O lamb of God, I come, I come!
